description: The Aston Martin V8 Vantage, produced from 2005 to 2017, brought Aston Martin ownership to a wider audience with a more compact, driver-focused sports car. Its naturally aspirated V8 evolved from 4.3 to 4.7 litres, with manual gearbox cars being the most desirable. The V12 Vantage S with its 565 bhp is the ultimate expression.
